verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If we call to Him He will answer us; If we run to Him He will run to us. If we lift our hands He will lift us up; Come now praise His name All you saints of God.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sing for joy To God, our strength, Sing for joy To God, our strength, Our strength! Our strength!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Draw near to Him He is here with us; Give Him your love He's in love with us. He will heal our hearts, He will cleanse our hands; If we rend our hearts He will heal our land.
